commands:
bash -c 'set -e; cat > /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/services/frame-processor/Dockerfile << EOF
FROM python:3.11-slim

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ffmpeg && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY shared/ /app/shared/
COPY services/frame-processor/requirements.txt /app/services/frame-processor/
RUN pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/services/frame-processor/requirements.txt

COPY services/frame-processor/ /app/services/frame-processor/

ENV PYTHONPATH=/app

CMD ["python", "services/frame-processor/src/main.py"]
EOF
cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; echo "=== REBUILING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose build --no-cache frame-processor; echo "=== STARTING FRAME-PROCESSOR ==="; docker-compose up -d frame-processor; sleep 5; echo "=== STATUS REPORT ==="; docker ps -a --filter "name=frame-processor"; docker logs frame-processor --tail=20'
